Description.value: Fixes Durability Overhaul's DisableAfterMaxRepairs Prefix on ItemActionEntryRepair.RefreshEnabled — it only checks XUiC_ItemStack (inventory) and skips XUiC_EquipmentStack (equipped slots), so equipped clothing/armor could be repaired past their MaxRepairs count indefinitely. This mod adds a Postfix that mirrors the same check for equipment slots and forces Enabled=false when repairs >= MaxRepairs. Pure Harmony, no XML, no dependency on DurabilityOverhaul.dll. Requires HarmonyX (0_TFP_Harmony). EAC must be off.
